profile.description: Balanced crawl and safe OWASP-aligned scan.

fixed_findings.title: Missing Security Header: Strict-Transport-Security
fixed_findings.evidence: HSTS header is missing. This helps enforce HTTPS connections.

fixed_findings.title: Missing Security Header: Content-Security-Policy
fixed_findings.evidence: Content Security Policy is missing. This may increase XSS risk.

fixed_findings.title: Missing Security Header: X-Frame-Options
fixed_findings.evidence: X-Frame-Options header is missing. The site may be vulnerable to clickjacking.

findings.title: Missing Security Header: Strict-Transport-Security
findings.description: HSTS header is missing. This helps enforce HTTPS connections.
findings.recommendation: Add Strict-Transport-Security header.
findings.evidence: HSTS header is missing. This helps enforce HTTPS connections.

findings.title: Missing Security Header: Content-Security-Policy
findings.description: Content Security Policy is missing. This may increase XSS risk.
findings.recommendation: Add a strong Content-Security-Policy header.
findings.evidence: Content Security Policy is missing. This may increase XSS risk.

findings.title: Missing Security Header: Referrer-Policy
findings.description: Referrer-Policy header is missing.
findings.recommendation: Add Referrer-Policy: no-referrer or strict-origin-when-cross-origin.

findings.title: Missing Security Header: Permissions-Policy
findings.description: Permissions-Policy header is missing.
findings.recommendation: Add Permissions-Policy to limit browser feature access.

findings.title: Information Disclosure in Header: Server
findings.description: The response exposes server technology information: Server: Heroku
findings.recommendation: Remove or minimize technology/version information from HTTP response headers.

findings.title: Interesting API Routes Exposed in Client Bundle
findings.description: Client-side JavaScript exposes route names related to authentication, users, admin, or account data.
findings.recommendation: Verify server-side authorization on every API route; do not rely on hidden frontend routes for access control.

findings.title: Interesting API Routes Exposed in Client Bundle
findings.description: Client-side JavaScript exposes route names related to authentication, users, admin, or account data.
findings.recommendation: Verify server-side authorization on every API route; do not rely on hidden frontend routes for access control.
